title: AI for Manufacturing Engineering
summary: AI techniques for smart and efficient manufacturing systems.
description: An applied course linking artificial intelligence with manufacturing engineering decisions, process performance, quality, maintenance and production systems.
audience: Manufacturing, industrial, mechanical and engineering management students and professionals.
prerequisites: Basic manufacturing systems knowledge and introductory statistics.
outcomes: Identify manufacturing decisions that can benefit from AI.
Prepare sensor and production data for analysis.
Evaluate quality, maintenance and process applications.
Connect AI models with manufacturing workflows and controls.
Design an implementation proposal for a smart manufacturing use case.

modules.title: AI opportunities in manufacturing
modules.description: Production, quality, maintenance, energy and flow.

modules.title: Industrial data foundations
modules.description: Sensors, historians, traceability and data quality.

modules.title: Predictive quality and maintenance
modules.description: Failure patterns, anomaly detection and decision thresholds.

modules.title: Smart manufacturing implementation
modules.description: Architecture, workforce, risk and value realisation.
